author: mark
text:
tests: stop story_11 colliding with hex IDs

story_11_list_filtered_by_status used "aa" and "bb" as task titles
and asserted on contains/!contains over the raw list output. The
listing includes the auto-generated bl-XXXX (4-hex) ID column, so
roughly 1/256 IDs contain "aa" or "bb" as a substring and the
test would intermittently fail.

Use "blocked-one" / "open-one" instead — strings that can't
appear in any 4-char hex ID, so the assertion only matches if
the title actually shows up in the listing. Same intent, no
flake. Coverage stays at 100%.
